={
  "phase": "{{ $node['Resolve Phase'].json.current_phase }}",
  "phase_output": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Execute Phase (jefe-marketing)'].json.output || '') }},
  "success_criteria": "standard phase-complete check",
  "request_id": "{{ $node['Resolve Phase'].json.request_id }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $node['Resolve Phase'].json.client_id }}"
}

={
  "request_id": "{{ $json.request_id || '' }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $json.client_id || '' }}",
  "campaign_brief": {{ JSON.stringify($json.campaign_brief ?? '') }},
  "current_phase": "{{ $json.current_phase || 'DISCOVER' }}",
  "current_phase_index": {{ Number($json.current_phase_index) || 0 }},
  "phase_output": {{ JSON.stringify($('Execute Phase (jefe-marketing)').item.json.output ?? $('Execute Phase (jefe-marketing)').item.json.response ?? '') }},
  "phase_outputs": {{ JSON.stringify($json.phase_outputs || {}) }},
  "retry_count": {{ Number($json.retry_count) || 0 }},
  "priority": "{{ $json.priority || 'normal' }}",
  "started_at": "{{ $json.started_at || new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

={
  "request_id": "{{ $json.request_id || '' }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $json.client_id || '' }}",
  "current_phase": "{{ $json.current_phase || 'UNKNOWN' }}",
  "retry_count": {{ Number($json.retry_count) || 0 }},
  "validation_error": {{ JSON.stringify($('Validate Phase Output (Evidence Collector)').item.json.error ?? $('Validate Phase Output (Evidence Collector)').item.json.rationale ?? 'Unknown error') }},
  "campaign_brief": {{ JSON.stringify($json.campaign_brief ?? '') }},
  "phases": {{ JSON.stringify($json.phases || []) }},
  "phase_outputs": {{ JSON.stringify($json.phase_outputs || {}) }},
  "started_at": "{{ $json.started_at || new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
